title: Cuneiform Tablet #0692: Neo-Assyrian Loan Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a loan contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a loan contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Assyrian period. Loan Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records loan contract matters typical of Neo-Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
